# Wand of Retribution
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Wand%20of%20Retribution&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo|name = Wand of Retribution
|desc = A golden wand of breathtaking power, created by elemental forces from the realms of ice and flame to unleash revenge on their enemies.
|slot = wand
|tier = T14
|minDmg = 120
|maxDmg = 160
|shots = 1
|range = yes
|projSpeed = 10
|lifetime = 800
|pierce = Shots hit multiple targets
|dropsFrom = drops randomly from bosses in the Necropolis
}}
